description: Invitation record from a subject-record author to a potential collaborator. Lives in the inviter's PDS. Generic over any Chive record (collections in v1; eprints, reviews, and other records in the future).

subject.description: StrongRef to any Chive-authored record being shared (collection, eprint, review, etc.).

invitee.description: DID of the user being invited.

role.description: Role granted by this invitation. Defaults to 'collaborator'.

message.description: Optional personal note shown to the invitee.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiration after which the invite is no longer valid.
